trigger: Before any long v5 evaluation launch, and immediately after either checkpoint finishes.
scope: Refresh model_matrix.tsv, selected_checkpoint_manifest.md, post_checkpoint_eval_queue.tsv, command consistency, parser contract, preflight, MLM progress, live health, storage, transition, and claim gates.
promotion_rule: This unlocks evaluation only when both rows show ready_for_wrapper=yes and preflight is ready-to-launch; it never promotes a performance claim.

trigger: Run only as an explicit v5 train-source diagnostic after both v5 models are wrapper-ready. Glot500-style final PPPL requires a held-out split and belongs to the strict v5.1 correction line.
command: RUN_TRAIN_SOURCE_PPPL_DIAGNOSTIC=1 WITH_PLOTS=1 GPU_RANDOM=0 GPU_FVT=1 bash scripts/run_v5_post_checkpoint_evals.sh pppl
runtime_env: GPU_RANDOM=0; GPU_FVT=1; RUN_TRAIN_SOURCE_PPPL_DIAGNOSTIC=1; PPPL_EVAL_ROLE=train_source_diagnostic; PPPL_MAX_EXAMPLES_PER_LANGUAGE=100; PPPL_MAX_LENGTH=128; PPPL_MASK_BATCH_SIZE=64; SKIP_MEASURED=1 optional only when resuming partial rows
scope: v5_random/v5_fvt PPPL pair; pseudoperplexity coverage=102/102, target10=10/10
promotion_rule: May support an after-MLM train-source intrinsic comparison only. Do not promote it as Glot500 held-out test PPPL.

trigger: Run after PPPL or in a staged pass when machine time requires splitting, but only after post-checkpoint preflight is ready-to-launch.
command: WITH_PLOTS=1 GPU_RANDOM=0 GPU_FVT=1 bash scripts/run_v5_post_checkpoint_evals.sh downstream
runtime_env: GPU_RANDOM=0; GPU_FVT=1; NER_TRAIN_LANGS=eng_Latn; POS_TRAIN_LANGS=tur_Latn; SKIP_MEASURED=1 optional only when resuming partial rows
scope: Tatoeba, Bible, Taxi1500, NER, POS, and Roundtrip for v5_random/v5_fvt; retrieval_tatoeba coverage=63/102, target10=0/10; retrieval_bible coverage=74/102, target10=0/10; text_classification coverage=1/102, target10=0/10; ner coverage=78/102, target10=0/10; pos coverage=58/102, target10=0/10; roundtrip_alignment coverage=74/102, target10=0/10
promotion_rule: Promote available-language downstream claims only; keep target10 downstream coverage limits explicit.

trigger: Before report/PPT edits after any result or blocker change.
scope: All Glot500 metric families remain present: PPPL, Tatoeba, Bible, Taxi1500, NER, POS, Roundtrip.
promotion_rule: A metric may be measured, pending, or explicitly blocked, but it must not disappear from the replay.

trigger: Run after each completed metric family, parser repair, coverage update, or figure-source update.
scope: Regenerate aggregation, tables, figures, report/PPT audits, PDFs, PPTX, release bundle, and handoff files.
promotion_rule: Only values parsed into 09_aggregation may replace report/PPT result slots.

trigger: Run after PPPL and available downstream v5 rows have been parsed and refreshed.
scope: Claim promotion, final decision tree, final claim freeze, manuscript/PPT sync, release bundle.
promotion_rule: Freeze only the decision-tree outcome; keep full-Glot500 and target10-downstream overclaims locked.
